name: English Muffin Bread (for Bread Machines)
recipeInstructions: Note: Ingredients are for Large Loaf (about 1.5 lbs), adjust number of servings for Medium or Small loaf. Put all ingredients in the machine in the order suggested by your machine's manufacturer and start it on the regular bread cycle. The top of the loaf should come out sunken, which is normal. The texture and taste will be similar to English Muffins, making this a great option for toasting!
